SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Interface IRevocationStatus

public interface IRevocationStatus
Revocation and transparency status for a certificate. Covers OCSP, CRL, OCSP Stapling, OneCRL, Must-Staple, and Certificate Transparency SCTs.
Author:
Milton Smith

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    IRevocationStatus.RevocationResult
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getCertSubjectDN()
    Subject DN of the certificate that was checked.
    String
    getCrlDistributionPoint()
    CRL distribution point URL that was queried.
    String
    getCrlErrorMessage()
    Error message from the CRL check, if any.
    String
    getCrlNextUpdate()
    CRL nextUpdate timestamp.
    long
    getCrlResponseTimeMs()
    Time taken to download and check the CRL in milliseconds.
    long
    getCrlSizeBytes()
    Size of the downloaded CRL in bytes.
    IRevocationStatus.RevocationResult
    getCrlStatus()
    CRL revocation check result.
    String
    getCrlThisUpdate()
    CRL thisUpdate timestamp.
    int
    getEmbeddedSctCount()
    Count of SCTs embedded in the certificate (OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.11129.2.4.2).
    String[]
    getEmbeddedSctDetails()
    Details for each embedded SCT.
    String
    getOcspErrorMessage()
    Error message from the OCSP check, if any.
    String
    getOcspNextUpdate()
    OCSP response nextUpdate timestamp.
    String
    getOcspResponderUrl()
    URL of the OCSP responder queried.
    long
    getOcspResponseTimeMs()
    Time taken for the OCSP query in milliseconds.
    int
    getOcspStaplingSctCount()
    Count of SCTs delivered via OCSP stapling response (OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.11129.2.4.5).
    String[]
    getOcspStaplingSctDetails()
    Details for each OCSP stapling SCT.
    IRevocationStatus.RevocationResult
    getOcspStatus()
    OCSP revocation check result.
    String
    getOcspThisUpdate()
    OCSP response thisUpdate timestamp.
    String
    getOneCrlErrorMessage()
    Error message from the OneCRL check, if any.
    IRevocationStatus.RevocationResult
    getOneCrlStatus()
    Mozilla OneCRL revocation check result.
    int
    getSctCount()
    Total SCT count across all delivery methods.
    String[]
    getSctDetails()
    Details for all SCTs (legacy, for backward compatibility).
    IRevocationStatus.RevocationResult
    getStapledOcspStatus()
    Status from the stapled OCSP response.
    int
    getTlsExtensionSctCount()
    Count of SCTs delivered via TLS extension (type 18).
    String[]
    getTlsExtensionSctDetails()
    Details for each TLS extension SCT.
    boolean
    isMustStaplePresent()
    Whether the certificate contains the Must-Staple TLS Feature extension (OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.5.5.7.1.24).
    boolean
    isOcspSignatureValid()
    Whether the OCSP response signature was validated.
    boolean
    isOcspStaplingPresent()
    Whether an OCSP stapled response was present in the TLS handshake.

  • Method Details

    • getOcspStatus

      IRevocationStatus.RevocationResult getOcspStatus()
      OCSP revocation check result.
      Returns:
      GOOD, REVOKED, UNKNOWN, ERROR, or NOT_CHECKED

    • getOcspResponderUrl

      String getOcspResponderUrl()
      URL of the OCSP responder queried.
      Returns:
      Responder URL, or null if not available

    • getOcspResponseTimeMs

      long getOcspResponseTimeMs()
      Time taken for the OCSP query in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      Response time, or -1 if not measured

    • getOcspThisUpdate

      String getOcspThisUpdate()
      OCSP response thisUpdate timestamp.
      Returns:
      Timestamp string, or null if unavailable

    • getOcspNextUpdate

      String getOcspNextUpdate()
      OCSP response nextUpdate timestamp.
      Returns:
      Timestamp string, or null if unavailable

    • isOcspSignatureValid

      boolean isOcspSignatureValid()
      Whether the OCSP response signature was validated.
      Returns:
      true if signature is valid

    • getOcspErrorMessage

      String getOcspErrorMessage()
      Error message from the OCSP check, if any.
      Returns:
      Error message, or null on success

    • getCrlStatus

      IRevocationStatus.RevocationResult getCrlStatus()
      CRL revocation check result.
      Returns:
      GOOD, REVOKED, UNKNOWN, ERROR, or NOT_CHECKED

    • getCrlDistributionPoint

      String getCrlDistributionPoint()
      CRL distribution point URL that was queried.
      Returns:
      Distribution point URL, or null if not available

    • getCrlResponseTimeMs

      long getCrlResponseTimeMs()
      Time taken to download and check the CRL in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      Response time, or -1 if not measured

    • getCrlSizeBytes

      long getCrlSizeBytes()
      Size of the downloaded CRL in bytes.
      Returns:
      CRL size, or -1 if not downloaded

    • getCrlThisUpdate

      String getCrlThisUpdate()
      CRL thisUpdate timestamp.
      Returns:
      Timestamp string, or null if unavailable

    • getCrlNextUpdate

      String getCrlNextUpdate()
      CRL nextUpdate timestamp.
      Returns:
      Timestamp string, or null if unavailable

    • getCrlErrorMessage

      String getCrlErrorMessage()
      Error message from the CRL check, if any.
      Returns:
      Error message, or null on success

    • isOcspStaplingPresent

      boolean isOcspStaplingPresent()
      Whether an OCSP stapled response was present in the TLS handshake.
      Returns:
      true if stapled response was captured

    • getStapledOcspStatus

      IRevocationStatus.RevocationResult getStapledOcspStatus()
      Status from the stapled OCSP response.
      Returns:
      GOOD, REVOKED, UNKNOWN, ERROR, or NOT_CHECKED

    • isMustStaplePresent

      boolean isMustStaplePresent()
      Whether the certificate contains the Must-Staple TLS Feature extension (OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.5.5.7.1.24).
      Returns:
      true if Must-Staple is present

    • getOneCrlStatus

      IRevocationStatus.RevocationResult getOneCrlStatus()
      Mozilla OneCRL revocation check result.
      Returns:
      GOOD, REVOKED, UNKNOWN, ERROR, or NOT_CHECKED

    • getOneCrlErrorMessage

      String getOneCrlErrorMessage()
      Error message from the OneCRL check, if any.
      Returns:
      Error message, or null on success

    • getSctCount

      int getSctCount()
      Total SCT count across all delivery methods.
      Returns:
      Total count of embedded + TLS extension + OCSP stapling SCTs

    • getSctDetails

      String[] getSctDetails()
      Details for all SCTs (legacy, for backward compatibility).
      Returns:
      Array of SCT detail strings

    • getEmbeddedSctCount

      int getEmbeddedSctCount()
      Count of SCTs embedded in the certificate (OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.11129.2.4.2).
      Returns:
      Number of embedded SCTs, or 0 if none

    • getEmbeddedSctDetails

      String[] getEmbeddedSctDetails()
      Details for each embedded SCT.
      Returns:
      Array of SCT detail strings

    • getTlsExtensionSctCount

      int getTlsExtensionSctCount()
      Count of SCTs delivered via TLS extension (type 18).
      Returns:
      Number of TLS extension SCTs, or -1 if not available (Java limitation)

    • getTlsExtensionSctDetails

      String[] getTlsExtensionSctDetails()
      Details for each TLS extension SCT.
      Returns:
      Array of SCT detail strings, or empty if N/A

    • getOcspStaplingSctCount

      int getOcspStaplingSctCount()
      Count of SCTs delivered via OCSP stapling response (OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.11129.2.4.5).
      Returns:
      Number of OCSP stapling SCTs, or 0 if none

    • getOcspStaplingSctDetails

      String[] getOcspStaplingSctDetails()
      Details for each OCSP stapling SCT.
      Returns:
      Array of SCT detail strings

    • getCertSubjectDN

      String getCertSubjectDN()
      Subject DN of the certificate that was checked.
      Returns:
      Certificate subject distinguished name
